signatures: search(key: string, libraryUuid?: string, classification?: ILIB_ClassificationIndex | Array<string>, itemsOfPage?: number, page?: number): Promise<Array<ILIB_3DModelSearchItem>>
returnSummary:

搜索到的 3D 模型属性列表

params.name: libraryUuid
